title: Aviros
description: A new dimension with a new ore, new tools, and new armor! (better than netherite)
body:
A new dimension, Aviros. Inside of the Aviros dimension, you can find Jynwood and Skyrite—which are used to make Skyrite tools and armor, which is slightly better than netherite.

**Make sure to bring an extra portal, so you don't get stuck!**
